news.title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
news.summary: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.

news.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
news.summary: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

news.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
news.summary: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024. ChatGPT will be integrated into the iPhone's operating system. The two companies will work together on a number of projects.

news.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
news.summary: At-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks. Following a wave of price hikes, at- home pastimes such as streaming movies and video games have become more expensive.

news.title: New housing law targets affordability — what it means for homebuyers and sellers
news.summary: Experts say the benefits of the measure will take time to show up in the market. The legislation is aimed at at least partly at addressing affordability.

news.title: ‘I’ve no idea how they got her number’: My student-loan servicer called a friend after I missed a payment. Is that legal?
news.summary: “She said it’s the second message they have left.” “I’m so sorry,” she says. “It’ll never happen again.’

news.title: ‘I get $1,460 in Social Security’: My millionaire ex-husband, 74, refuses to pay alimony. What can I do?
news.summary: “I have very little money, while my ex’s financial statements show assets in the millions,” she says. “I’m not rich. I’ve never been rich.”

news.title: ‘Day-to-day dread’ haunts frustrated job seekers in era of low hiring. When will it end?
news.summary: Americans are worried about their job prospects, even though the unemployment rate is historically low. Finding a job was easy a few years ago. Now, Americans are worried.

news.title: Regular water is no longer enough. Welcome to the corporate gold rush around ‘functional hydration.’
news.summary: Social media and GLP-1s are spurring increased interest in hydration products. Companies are responding with things like electrolyte mixes and “hydrating hot chocolate.”

news.title: The U.S. stock market is becoming ‘too big to fail’
news.summary: . Why protracted bear markets may be a thing of the past. What's next for the U.S. stock market? We'll find out.
